bash_commands.command:
for file in /workspace/data-plane-api--84e84367/envoy/service/**/v3/*.proto; do
  if grep -q "^service " "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "$file:"
    grep "^service " "$file"
  fi
done | head -100

for file in /workspace/data-plane-api--84e84367/envoy/service/**/v2/*.proto; do
  if grep -q "^service " "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "$file:"
    grep "^service " "$file"
  fi
done

for file in /workspace/data-plane-api--84e84367/envoy/service/**/v2alpha/*.proto; do
  if grep -q "^service " "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "$file:"
    grep "^service " "$file"
  fi
done

for file in /workspace/data-plane-api--84e84367/envoy/service/**/v3alpha/*.proto; do
  if grep -q "^service " "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "$file:"
    grep "^service " "$file"
  fi
done

find /workspace/data-plane-api--84e84367/contrib -name "*.proto" -type f | while read file; do
  if grep -q "^service " "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "$file:"
    grep "^service " "$file"
  fi
done

for file in /workspace/data-plane-api--84e84367/envoy/api/v2/*.proto; do
  if grep -q "^service " "$file" 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "$file:"
    grep "^service " "$file"
  fi
done

  "text": "The task identified gRPC service definitions shared between envoyproxy/envoy and grpc/grpc repositories.\n\n## envoyproxy/data-plane-api xDS Services\n\nThe data-plane-api repository contains 42 .proto files with service definitions across multiple API versions (v2, v2alpha, v3, v3alpha). These define the xDS (Extensible Discovery Service) protocol used by Envoy for dynamic configuration:\n\n### v2 API Services (Legacy/Deprecated):\n- **envoy/api/v2/cds.proto**: ClusterDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/api/v2/eds.proto**: EndpointDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/api/v2/lds.proto**: ListenerDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/api/v2/rds.proto**: RouteDiscoveryService, VirtualHostDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/api/v2/srds.proto**: ScopedRoutesDiscoveryService\n\n### v2 Service APIs:\n- **envoy/service/discovery/v2/ads.proto**: AggregatedDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/discovery/v2/hds.proto**: HealthDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/discovery/v2/rtds.proto**: RuntimeDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/discovery/v2/sds.proto**: SecretDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/accesslog/v2/als.proto**: AccessLogService\n- **envoy/service/auth/v2/external_auth.proto**: Authorization\n- **envoy/service/load_stats/v2/lrs.proto**: LoadReportingService\n- **envoy/service/metrics/v2/metrics_service.proto**: MetricsService\n- **envoy/service/ratelimit/v2/rls.proto**: RateLimitService\n- **envoy/service/status/v2/csds.proto**: ClientStatusDiscoveryService\n\n### v2alpha Services:\n- **envoy/service/auth/v2alpha/external_auth.proto**: Authorization\n- **envoy/service/event_reporting/v2alpha/event_reporting_service.proto**: EventReportingService\n- **envoy/service/tap/v2alpha/tap.proto**: TapSinkService\n\n### v3 API Services (Current):\n- **envoy/service/discovery/v3/ads.proto**: AggregatedDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/accesslog/v3/als.proto**: AccessLogService\n- **envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.proto**: Authorization\n- **envoy/service/cluster/v3/cds.proto**: ClusterDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/endpoint/v3/eds.proto**: EndpointDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/endpoint/v3/leds.proto**: LocalityEndpointDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/event_reporting/v3/event_reporting_service.proto**: EventReportingService\n- **envoy/service/ext_proc/v3/external_processor.proto**: ExternalProcessor\n- **envoy/service/extension/v3/config_discovery.proto**: ExtensionConfigDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/health/v3/hds.proto**: HealthDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/listener/v3/lds.proto**: ListenerDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/load_stats/v3/lrs.proto**: LoadReportingService\n- **envoy/service/metrics/v3/metrics_service.proto**: MetricsService\n- **envoy/service/network_ext_proc/v3/network_external_processor.proto**: NetworkExternalProcessor\n- **envoy/service/rate_limit_quota/v3/rlqs.proto**: RateLimitQuotaService\n- **envoy/service/ratelimit/v3/rls.proto**: RateLimitService\n- **envoy/service/redis_auth/v3/redis_external_auth.proto**: RedisProxyExternalAuth\n- **envoy/service/route/v3/rds.proto**: RouteDiscoveryService, VirtualHostDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/route/v3/srds.proto**: ScopedRoutesDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/runtime/v3/rtds.proto**: RuntimeDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/secret/v3/sds.proto**: SecretDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/status/v3/csds.proto**: ClientStatusDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/tap/v3/tap.proto**: TapSinkService\n\n### v3alpha Services (Experimental):\n- **contrib/envoy/extensions/filters/network/sip_proxy/tra/v3alpha/tra.proto**: TraService\n\n## grpc/grpc Health Checking Service\n\nThe gRPC repository implements the standard gRPC Health Checking Protocol (grpc_health_v1.Health) with both protocol definition and multiple language implementations:\n\n### Protocol Definition:\n- **src/proto/grpc/health/v1/health.proto**: Defines the Health service with rpc methods Check() and Watch()\n\n### C++ Implementation:\n- **src/cpp/server/health/default_health_check_service.cc**: DefaultHealthCheckService implementation\n- **src/cpp/server/health/default_health_check_service.h**: Header file with service interface\n- **src/cpp/server/health/health_check_service.cc**: Health check service initialization\n- **src/cpp/server/health/health_check_service_server_builder_option.cc**: Server builder integration\n\n### Python Implementation:\n- **src/python/grpcio_health_checking/grpc_health/v1/health.py**: HealthServicer class with Check() and Watch() methods\n- **src/python/grpcio_health_checking/grpc_health/v1/_async.py**: Async implementation support\n\n### Ruby Implementation:\n- **src/ruby/pb/grpc/health/v1/health_pb.rb**: Protocol buffer generated code\n- **src/ruby/pb/grpc/health/v1/health_services_pb.rb**: Generated service code\n\nThe Health service is a standard gRPC service that provides health checking capabilities for gRPC services, allowing clients to check if a service is healthy (SERVING, NOT_SERVING, or SERVICE_UNKNOWN) through both unary (Check) and streaming (Watch) RPC methods."
}

conversation_events.text:
# Cross-Org gRPC Service Definition Discovery

## Your Task

Find the gRPC service definitions that are shared between `envoyproxy/envoy` and `grpc/grpc`. Specifically: 1. In `envoyproxy/data-plane-api`, find all `.proto` files that define `service` declarations using `rpc` methods (the xDS service definitions). 2. In `grpc/grpc`, find the source files that implement the `grpc_health_v1.Health` service (the standard gRPC health checking protocol). Report the repo, file path, and service name for each.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the crossorg domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2, sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367, sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6, sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e.

**Note:** Additional repositories are accessible via Sourcegraph MCP tools:
- `sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2` (envoyproxy/envoy)
- `sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367` (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
- `sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6` (envoyproxy/go-control-plane)
- `sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e` (grpc/grpc)

## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
I'll help you find the gRPC service definitions shared between these repositories. Let me start by exploring the relevant directories.

Perfect! I've completed the task and created `/workspace/answer.json` with comprehensive findings about the gRPC service definitions shared between the repositories.

## Summary of Findings

### **envoyproxy/data-plane-api** - xDS Service Definitions
I found **42 .proto files** that define gRPC services across multiple API versions:
- **v2 API Services**: 4 base services (cds.proto, eds.proto, lds.proto, rds.proto, srds.proto)
- **v2 Service APIs**: 10 service files (ads.proto, hds.proto, rtds.proto, sds.proto, als.proto, auth, lrs, metrics, ratelimit, csds)
- **v2alpha**: 3 service files (auth, event_reporting, tap)
- **v3 Current APIs**: 23 service files (the latest versions of all discovery, auth, and management services)
- **v3alpha Experimental**: 1 service file (tra.proto for SIP proxy)

**Key xDS services include**:
- Cluster Discovery Service (CDS)
- Endpoint Discovery Service (EDS)
- Listener Discovery Service (LDS)
- Route Discovery Service (RDS)
- Scoped Routes Discovery Service (SRDS)
- Aggregated Discovery Service (ADS)
- Health Discovery Service (HDS)
- Authorization Service
- Load Reporting Service
- And many more management services

### **grpc/grpc** - Health Checking Protocol
Found **9 source files** implementing the standard gRPC Health Checking Protocol:
- **Proto definition**: `src/proto/grpc/health/v1/health.proto` - Defines the `Health` service with `Check()` and `Watch()` RPC methods
- **C++ Implementation**: 4 files for DefaultHealthCheckService
- **Python Implementation**: 2 files with HealthServicer class
- **Ruby Implementation**: 2 generated service files

The answer file contains all file paths, service symbols, and a comprehensive narrative explaining the role of these services in the Envoy and gRPC ecosystems.

  "text": "The task identified gRPC service definitions shared between envoyproxy/envoy and grpc/grpc repositories.\n\n## envoyproxy/data-plane-api xDS Services\n\nThe data-plane-api repository contains 42 .proto files with service definitions across multiple API versions (v2, v2alpha, v3, v3alpha). These define the xDS (Extensible Discovery Service) protocol used by Envoy for dynamic configuration:\n\n### v2 API Services (Legacy/Deprecated):\n- **envoy/api/v2/cds.proto**: ClusterDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/api/v2/eds.proto**: EndpointDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/api/v2/lds.proto**: ListenerDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/api/v2/rds.proto**: RouteDiscoveryService, VirtualHostDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/api/v2/srds.proto**: ScopedRoutesDiscoveryService\n\n### v2 Service APIs:\n- **envoy/service/discovery/v2/ads.proto**: AggregatedDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/discovery/v2/hds.proto**: HealthDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/discovery/v2/rtds.proto**: RuntimeDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/discovery/v2/sds.proto**: SecretDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/accesslog/v2/als.proto**: AccessLogService\n- **envoy/service/auth/v2/external_auth.proto**: Authorization\n- **envoy/service/load_stats/v2/lrs.proto**: LoadReportingService\n- **envoy/service/metrics/v2/metrics_service.proto**: MetricsService\n- **envoy/service/ratelimit/v2/rls.proto**: RateLimitService\n- **envoy/service/status/v2/csds.proto**: ClientStatusDiscoveryService\n\n### v2alpha Services:\n- **envoy/service/auth/v2alpha/external_auth.proto**: Authorization\n- **envoy/service/event_reporting/v2alpha/event_reporting_service.proto**: EventReportingService\n- **envoy/service/tap/v2alpha/tap.proto**: TapSinkService\n\n### v3 API Services (Current):\n- **envoy/service/discovery/v3/ads.proto**: AggregatedDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/accesslog/v3/als.proto**: AccessLogService\n- **envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.proto**: Authorization\n- **envoy/service/cluster/v3/cds.proto**: ClusterDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/endpoint/v3/eds.proto**: EndpointDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/endpoint/v3/leds.proto**: LocalityEndpointDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/event_reporting/v3/event_reporting_service.proto**: EventReportingService\n- **envoy/service/ext_proc/v3/external_processor.proto**: ExternalProcessor\n- **envoy/service/extension/v3/config_discovery.proto**: ExtensionConfigDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/health/v3/hds.proto**: HealthDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/listener/v3/lds.proto**: ListenerDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/load_stats/v3/lrs.proto**: LoadReportingService\n- **envoy/service/metrics/v3/metrics_service.proto**: MetricsService\n- **envoy/service/network_ext_proc/v3/network_external_processor.proto**: NetworkExternalProcessor\n- **envoy/service/rate_limit_quota/v3/rlqs.proto**: RateLimitQuotaService\n- **envoy/service/ratelimit/v3/rls.proto**: RateLimitService\n- **envoy/service/redis_auth/v3/redis_external_auth.proto**: RedisProxyExternalAuth\n- **envoy/service/route/v3/rds.proto**: RouteDiscoveryService, VirtualHostDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/route/v3/srds.proto**: ScopedRoutesDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/runtime/v3/rtds.proto**: RuntimeDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/secret/v3/sds.proto**: SecretDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/status/v3/csds.proto**: ClientStatusDiscoveryService\n- **envoy/service/tap/v3/tap.proto**: TapSinkService\n\n### v3alpha Services (Experimental):\n- **contrib/envoy/extensions/filters/network/sip_proxy/tra/v3alpha/tra.proto**: TraService\n\n## grpc/grpc Health Checking Service\n\nThe gRPC repository implements the standard gRPC Health Checking Protocol (grpc_health_v1.Health) with both protocol definition and multiple language implementations:\n\n### Protocol Definition:\n- **src/proto/grpc/health/v1/health.proto**: Defines the Health service with rpc methods Check() and Watch()\n\n### C++ Implementation:\n- **src/cpp/server/health/default_health_check_service.cc**: DefaultHealthCheckService implementation\n- **src/cpp/server/health/default_health_check_service.h**: Header file with service interface\n- **src/cpp/server/health/health_check_service.cc**: Health check service initialization\n- **src/cpp/server/health/health_check_service_server_builder_option.cc**: Server builder integration\n\n### Python Implementation:\n- **src/python/grpcio_health_checking/grpc_health/v1/health.py**: HealthServicer class with Check() and Watch() methods\n- **src/python/grpcio_health_checking/grpc_health/v1/_async.py**: Async implementation support\n\n### Ruby Implementation:\n- **src/ruby/pb/grpc/health/v1/health_pb.rb**: Protocol buffer generated code\n- **src/ruby/pb/grpc/health/v1/health_services_pb.rb**: Generated service code\n\nThe Health service is a standard gRPC service that provides health checking capabilities for gRPC services, allowing clients to check if a service is healthy (SERVING, NOT_SERVING, or SERVICE_UNKNOWN) through both unary (Check) and streaming (Watch) RPC methods."
}
